articles.author: Amanda Silberling
articles.title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO? - TechCrunch
articles.description: Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world's most valuable companies, but if you're not a dedicated Apple enthusiast, you've probably never heard of this man, who has largely remained out of the spotlight until now.
articles.content: After 15 years, Tim Cook will hand off the Apple CEO role to John Ternus, the company’s senior vice president of hardware engineering. Starting on September 1, Ternus will lead one of the world’s mos… [+4655 chars]

articles.title: Absurd study suggests eating fruits and vegetables leads to cancer - Ars Technica
articles.description: Experts point out a series of flaws, including small size and no control group.
